title: TRANSFORM — Automated Transfer
titleLarge: Robotic lateral transfer eliminates friction, shear forces, and physical strain
desc: Designed for Indian hospital workflows — from government PHCs to corporate super-specialty hospitals. Single-operator transfers with Zero Relative Velocity.
shortDesc: ZRV technology enables safe, single-operator transfers. 60% lower cost than imported alternatives.
desc1: ALTRAS-1's automated transfer system uses advanced robotics to move patients laterally without manual lifting. Designed for Indian hospitals with narrow corridors and varying infrastructure.
desc2: This breakthrough technology enables a single healthcare professional to safely transfer patients weighing up to 250kg, addressing India's acute nursing shortage where 1 nurse serves 670 patients.
desc3: Automated patient transfer reduces caregiver injury risk by 93% — saving ₹50,000+ per prevented injury.

title: PROTECT — Continuous Monitoring
titleLarge: Integrated ECG, SpO₂, and NIBP monitoring ensures uninterrupted patient visibility
desc: No more disconnecting monitors during transfers — a critical gap in Indian ICUs. Compatible with major Indian-made patient monitors.
shortDesc: Real-time ECG, SpO₂, and blood pressure monitoring. Works with Indian-made monitors.
desc1: During traditional patient transfers in Indian hospitals, vital signs monitoring is typically disconnected. ALTRAS-1 eliminates this gap with integrated medical-grade monitoring.
desc2: Compatible with major Indian-manufactured monitors including BPL, Schiller, and Nidek. Designed for Indian power conditions with battery backup.
desc3: Continuous monitoring during transfers reduces adverse events and ensures complete care continuity across Tier 1 to Tier 3 city hospitals.

title: MONITOR — AI-Based Alignment
titleLarge: Depth-based sensing improves alignment and reduces fall risk
desc: Privacy-compliant AI that works without capturing identifiable images — compliant with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023.
shortDesc: DPDP Act compliant depth sensing. No identifiable images captured.
desc1: ALTRAS-1 uses advanced depth-based computer vision to map patient body positioning without capturing identifiable images, ensuring compliance with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023.
desc2: The AI system provides real-time feedback in Hindi and regional languages, suggesting optimal transfer positions and alerting if the patient is at risk.
desc3: AI-based alignment reduces transfer time by 40% — critical for high-volume Indian hospitals where nurses perform 15-20 transfers per shift.

title: Built for Indian Healthcare
titleLarge: From AIIMS Delhi to district hospitals in Jharkhand — designed for all
desc: Handles voltage fluctuations, works in narrow corridors, priced for Tier 2 and Tier 3 city hospitals. Local support, local spare parts.
shortDesc: Indian power conditions, Indian hospital infrastructure, Indian budgets.
desc1: Government District Hospitals need affordable, rugged equipment. Private Multi-Specialty Hospitals need advanced features. Ayushman Bharat beneficiaries deserve world-class care.
desc2: ALTRAS-1 is designed for all — with Hindi and regional language interfaces, compact design for Indian corridors, and surge protection for Indian power grids.
desc3: Pan-India service network. Spare parts manufactured in India. 24/7 remote diagnostics. Training in regional languages.
